_meta.description: Real click-resolver fixtures: three generated fantasy maps from live openflipbook sessions (July 2026), one crosshair tap per case. Tap points are the detector-verified entity centroids (top-left bbox + half w/h), each confirmed by eye against the rendered map — several maps print the feature name in-image, so ground truth is human-checkable. groundable:false cases sit on clearly blank parchment for the rejection-recall metric.
_meta.provenance: Images pulled from the demo-world Minio bucket; sessions cb89db21 (harbor), 2e8021a9 (oasis), 1abbb3ba (fishing village). Tap centroids verified via crosshair overlay before commit.

field_reference.image_path: relative to this JSON file's directory
field_reference.x_pct: 0..1, normalized X of click point (origin top-left)
field_reference.parent_title: title of the page being clicked on (passed to VLM as context)
field_reference.parent_query: the original user query that produced the parent page
field_reference.expected_subject: human-labelled ground-truth subject phrase (the plain name a viewer would say)
field_reference.alternates: other acceptable phrasings incl. the fancy in-world name
field_reference.groundable: false when the tap lands on blank space; drives rejection-recall
field_reference.notes: free-text human notes about the case

how_to_add_cases: 1. Save the source illustration to fixtures/images/real/{name}.png
2. Overlay a crosshair at your chosen x_pct,y_pct and CONFIRM it lands on the feature by eye
3. Write expected_subject as a viewer would name it; add the in-world name as an alternate
4. Add a few groundable:false cases on blank regions so rejection-recall has teeth

cases.parent_query: a fishing village on a crescent bay with a white lighthouse on the north point
cases.notes: map prints 'North Point Lighthouse' beside the tower
